headline: Q1 IT Services & Consulting Earnings: Gartner (NYSE:IT) Earns Top Marks
summary: Wrapping up Q1 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the it services & consulting stocks, including Gartner (NYSE:IT) and its peers.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Underweight on Gartner, Lowers Price Target to $120
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jason Haas   maintains Gartner (NYSE:IT) with a Underweight and lowers the price target from $140 to $120.
